items.title: Business Management Solution (BZComposer)
items.description: Business management solution to automate core business processes; delivered key features on time and improved operational efficiency.

items.title: Enterprise Document Management System & Process Automation
items.description: Automated document-processing workflows and improved document retrieval performance for a large-scale banking operation.

items.title: e-Invoicing Integration for MyInvois (Malaysia LHDNM)
items.description: End-to-end e-Invoicing integration with real-time validation, digital signatures, and regulatory compliance.

items.title: Multi-Modal RAG for Higher Education
items.description: Document question-answering system over PDFs, tables, scanned pages, and images with grounded answers.

items.title: Loan Prediction Model
items.description: Predicts loan approval and credit risk using historical applicant data and tuned supervised-learning models.

items.title: Cybersecurity Threat and Vulnerability Prediction
items.description: Predictive model for vulnerability prioritization, enterprise risk scoring, and explainable security decision support.

items.title: Election Result Management System
items.description: National election-results platform designed for reliable processing, database availability, and performance under heavy loads.

items.title: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
items.description: ERP solution that automated core business processes and streamlined operations for multiple enterprise clients.
